languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

languages.text: "Не думаю, что шерин стоит переживать по этому поводу. Все знают, кто истинный — и текущий — глава династии фон Валанциус".
"I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Не думаю, что шерин стоит переживать по этому поводу. Все знают, кто истинный — и текущий — глава династии фон Валанциус".

traits.locale_text: "So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."
"So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."
"So many von Valancius on one voidship... There haven't been this many on board since before Theodora's death. I hope the numbers don't drop so dramatically this time."

languages.text: 「私のシェリーンがそんなことに心配する必要はないと思いますわ。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の真の、そして現在の当主は誰であるかは、誰もが知っているのです」
languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「私のシェリーンがそんなことに心配する必要はないと思います。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の真の、そして現在の当主は誰であるかは、誰もが知っているのです。」

languages.text: « Je ne vois pas pourquoi {mf|mon|ma} shereen s'en préoccuperait. Tout le monde sait qui est l'{mf|actuel et le vrai dirigeant|actuelle et la vraie dirigeante} de la dynastie von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois pas pourquoi {mf|mon|ma} shereen s'en préoccuperait. Tout le monde sait qui est l'{mf|actuel et le vrai dirigeant|actuelle et la vraie dirigeante} de la dynastie von Valancius. »

languages.text: "Ich denke nicht, dass sich {mf|mein Shereen|meine Shereen} darüber Gedanken machen sollte. Alle wissen, wer was wahre – und aktuelle – Oberhaupt der Dynastie derer von Valancius ist."
languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke nicht, dass sich {mf|mein Shereen|meine Shereen} darüber Gedanken machen sollte. Alle wissen, wer was wahre – und aktuelle – Oberhaupt der Dynastie derer von Valancius ist."

languages.text: "Şirinimin bu konuda endişelenmesi gerektiğini sanmıyorum. Von Valancius hanedanlığının gerçek ve mevcut başının kim olduğunu herkes biliyor."
languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Şirinimin bu konuda endişelenmesi gerektiğini sanmıyorum. Von Valancius hanedanlığının gerçek ve mevcut başının kim olduğunu herkes biliyor."

languages.text: «No creo que mi shereen deba preocuparse por eso. Todo el mundo sabe quién es {mf|el verdadero (y único)|la verdadera (y única)} dirigente de la dinastía von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «No creo que mi shereen deba preocuparse por eso. Todo el mundo sabe quién es {mf|el verdadero (y único)|la verdadera (y única)} dirigente de la dinastía von Valancius».

languages.text: “亲爱的，我认为你完全不必担心。大家都知道谁才是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝真正的——且现任的——掌舵人。”
languages.original_text: "I don't think my shereen should worry about that. Everyone knows who is the true — and current — head of the von Valancius dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “亲爱的，我认为你完全不必担心。大家都知道谁才是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝真正的——且现任的——掌舵人。”
